purpose: Compact startup memory for new ELEMENTARY chats. Load this instead of the full problem/solution ledger unless deep retrieval is required.

entries.next: No active blocker. If token visibility fails again, verify ELEMENTARY_PUBLIC_STARTUP_MIRROR_TOKEN is an Actions repository secret in borislavppetrov-beep/elementary-construction-os, not in the public mirror repository.
entries.avoid: Do not recreate runners or rewrite startup-mirror-sync before checking repository-secret scope. Do not expose token value.

entries.next: Route Windows-native operations to Runner 03 or the governed Windows-side service channel.
entries.avoid: Do not call Windows .exe directly from WSL/Linux runner jobs.

entries.next: Read startup bundle, owner authorization, runtime inventory and memory index before limitation claims.
entries.avoid: Do not treat visible native connectors as complete capability inventory.

entries.next: Use explicit runner labels for new jobs.
entries.avoid: Do not send all workflows to one generic self-hosted lane.
